name: Berghoff Ragout (Ragout a La Berghof)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into thin strips.
2. Melt 3/4 cup butter in a large frying pan.
3. Brown the meat over medium-high heat.
4. Remove the browned meat and set aside.
5. In the remaining butter, sauté the onion for 2 minutes.
6. Add the green bell pepper and mushrooms to the pan. Cook for an additional 3 minutes.
7. Melt another 1/4 cup of butter and add the flour. Stir until smooth.
8. Gradually add the beef broth, stirring constantly, until the sauce has thickened.
9. Stir in the white wine and seasonings (salt, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco to taste).
10. Return the meat and mushroom mixture to the pan.
11. Cover and simmer for 45 minutes to 1 hour, or until the steak is tender.
12. Serve with buttered noodles or dumplings.
